hero.tagline: We lead the way, You win the day
hero.subtitle: Transport, warehousing, relocations and loading. National and international coverage.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Everything you need for your logistics
services.subtitle: We offer integrated solutions tailored to the scale and needs of your business.

about.label: About Us
about.p1: At Atlant – Logistics & Relocations we manage the movement of machinery, equipment and goods with precision and predictability. We have a fleet, lifting equipment and a warehouse base with over 10,000 pallet positions.
about.p2: We carry out industrial relocations, assembly and disassembly, as well as domestic and international transport with full control and traceability.

why.label: Why Choose Atlant
why.title: Coordination at every step
why.subtitle: Our values and the way we work make the difference.
why.benefit1Text: Professional and coordinated action of our teams ensures quality and speed.
why.benefit2Text: Our call managers are ready to keep you informed about ongoing services.
why.benefit3Text: We guarantee reliable storage and safe delivery of cargo.
why.benefit4Text: With flexible pricing, we create opportunities for mutually beneficial cooperation.

cta.subtitle: Contact us and you will receive a personalized offer tailored to your needs and budget.

footer.tagline: We lead the way, You win the day!
footer.description: Reliable logistics partner since 2006 with national and international coverage.

cookieConsent.bannerText: We use cookies. You can change your choice at any time.
cookieConsent.preferencesIntro: Necessary cookies and the Google Ads marketing tag are always active. Analytics (Google Analytics / GA4) are optional and used only for statistics.
cookieConsent.googleAdsDesc: Measures visits and conversions from Google ads. The tag loads automatically on every visit.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how the site is used and improve it.
cookieConsent.privacyModalP1: This site uses Google Analytics (GA4) only for statistics and content improvement. We do not collect or store personal data in our own databases.
cookieConsent.privacyModalLi3: Your cookie choice is stored for 6 months.
cookieConsent.privacyModalP2: We use a Google service for statistics; processing follows their rules. Details:

inquiry.label: Inquiry
inquiry.step1Desc: Please indicate which service you would like a quote for.
inquiry.successMessage: We will get back to you shortly.

meta.homeDescription: Reliable logistics partner from Plovdiv. Transport, warehousing, relocations and loading & unloading services. National and international coverage. ISO 9001 certified.

contact.label: Contacts
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Our team is ready to answer your questions and prepare a personalized offer.
contact.hours: Monday – Saturday: 08:00 – 18:00. Sunday – by prior appointment.
contact.ctaText: Fill in the short inquiry form and receive an offer within the working day.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.photoSubtitle: Moments from our work – relocations, transport and logistics projects.
gallery.videoEmpty: The video gallery will be available soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: Atlant Logistics complies with international data protection regulations and GDPR requirements.
privacy.p2: We collect only data necessary to process inquiries and contact you: name, phone, email, city and message.
privacy.p3: Data is used solely to respond to inquiries, prepare offers and deliver agreed services. We do not sell personal data to third parties without legal basis.
privacy.p4: We use cookies to improve the website experience and analyze traffic. You may refuse non-essential cookies via your browser settings.
privacy.p5: You have the right to access, correct, delete and restrict processing of your data. Contact us via the inquiry form or the email listed on the Contacts page.
privacy.p6: Data is retained only as long as necessary for the purposes collected or as required by law.
privacy.p7: For privacy-related questions, contact Atlant Logistics at the address on the Contacts page.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.p1: By using atlant.bg you accept these terms. The site provides information about Atlant Logistics & Relocations services.
terms.p2: Site content is informational and does not automatically create a contract. A contract is formed after written confirmation of an offer.
terms.p3: All text, images and trademarks are protected by copyright.
terms.p4: Unauthorized copying of content without written consent is not permitted.
terms.p5: Provide accurate and current information when submitting inquiries. Atlant is not liable for incorrect information provided by the client.
terms.p6: Services are performed under agreed terms, deadlines and ISO 9001 quality standards.
terms.p7: For questions about these terms, contact Atlant Logistics.
